jd_text: About the job: FIX Dessert Chocolatier is seeking a dynamic and strategic Head of PR & Communications to lead the brand’s public image, storytelling, and media presence. The role will focus on building strong media relationships, managing brand reputation, and driving impactful communication strategies that support the company’s growth and visibility. PR Strategy & Brand Positioning Develop and execute the overall PR and communications strategy aligned with the company’s vision and business goals. Define and maintain brand voice, messaging, and storytelling across all communication channels. Identify opportunities to strengthen the brand’s positioning in the premium dessert and lifestyle sector. Support major product launches, brand campaigns, and announcements. Media Relations & Publicity Build and maintain relationships with regional and international media outlets. Prepare and distribute press releases, media kits, and official brand communications Coordinate media interviews, press features, and brand events. Monitor and evaluate media coverage and PR performance. Influencer & Partnership Communications Develop strategies for influencer collaborations and brand partnerships. Identify and manage brand ambassadors and key opinion leaders aligned with the brand. Lead communications around collaborations, campaigns, and co-branded initiatives. Corporate & Internal Communications Ensure consistent messaging across internal teams and external stakeholders. Support leadership with executive communications, speeches, and presentations. Prepare communication materials for internal updates and corporate announcements. Reputation & Crisis Management Protect and enhance the company’s brand reputation. Develop and implement crisis communication strategies and response plans. Manage sensitive issues with clear and timely communication. Digital & Social PR Work closely with marketing and social media teams to amplify digital campaigns and product launches. Manage online media coverage and digital PR opportunities. Track brand sentiment and engagement across digital channels. Leadership & Agency Management Manage external PR agencies and communication partners. Set KPIs and measure the success of PR initiatives. Skills Strong media relations and networking skills Excellent written and verbal communication Strategic thinking and brand storytelling Crisis communication and reputation management Influencer and partnership management Digital and social media communication expertise Leadership and team management skills Strong organizational and project management abilities Experience 8-12+ years of experience in Public Relations, Corporate Communications, or Brand Communications. Experience in F&B, hospitality, lifestyle, luxury, or consumer brands is highly preferred. Proven track record of managing high-impact PR campaigns and media coverage. Strong network with regional and international media outlets and influencers. Experience managing PR agencies and cross-functional teams. Bachelor’s degree in Public Relations, Communications, Marketing, Journalism, or related field (Master’s degree is a plus). Interested candidates may send their updated CV to: hr@fixchocolatier.com. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
